items.headline: Thornton Flooring acquires nine Carpetland USA locations
items.summary: Thornton Flooring & Design Center announced it has acquired all nine Carpetland USA locations across two Midwestern states, according to an article in Floor…

items.headline: A break from the heat and humidity
items.summary: It'll still be humid Tuesday across the Quad Cities, but cooler air settles in for a few days before the heat and humidity returns. It'll be mostly dry over the…

items.headline: Save More, Davenport, adds U-Haul services
items.summary: U-Haul Co. of Iowa, Inc. has announced that Save More, a local grocery store, has signed on as a U-Haul neighborhood dealer to serve the Davenport community, ac…

items.headline: Iowa State Fair invites service members to sing national anthem during daily ceremony
items.summary: Fair organizers are looking for veteran, law enforcement or military groups to perform the national anthem at 10 a.m. every day of the fair.

items.headline: 2026 Iowa State Fair full Grandstand lineup
items.summary: With artists representing country, indie pop, rock, rap, Christian and more, this year's Grandstand lineup has something for everyone.

items.headline: Des Moines-based Krause Group to acquire majority stake in historic Portuguese soccer club
items.summary: Krause Group's portfolio already includes the soccer clubs Parma Calcio 1913 in Italy and the Des Moines Menace in Iowa.

items.headline: Eldridge approves city absorption of volunteer fire department
items.summary: The Eldridge City Council decided to take over control of the fire department at a city council meeting Monday night. The fire department was all-volunteer unti…

items.headline: Eldridge to take on volunteer fire company as a City department
items.summary: Negotiations soured last month amid disputes over proposed budgets and trust in the City, but all parties came back to the table for the final decision.

items.headline: Inmate found dead at Dixon Correctional Center, Illinois DOC confirms
items.summary: Officials with the Illinois Department of Corrections said the facility is currently on a level one lockdown while an investigation into the death continues.

items.headline: Muscatine City Council to rule on building appeals following partial collapse
items.summary: The Muscatine City Council will consider evidence and rule on nine appeals filed by owners of buildings on the north side of the 200 block of E. 2nd St. Accordi…

items.headline: John Deere named presenting sponsor of 2026 MLB at Field of Dreams game
items.summary: The Minnesota Twins and Philadelphia Phillies will play at the iconic movie site in Dyersville, Iowa, on Aug. 13.

items.headline: Quad Cities students mow lawns for free through YWCA program
items.summary: Quad Cities students are gaining job skills and community spirit by providing free lawn care to residents in need, as part of the YWCA's summer program.
